description: Native app surfaces phase A3b: multiple apps on one device share a single UiAutomator2 session, and targeting a surface by name activates (foregrounds) it — the active-surface switch. Two preinstalled apps (Settings and the AOSP Clock) open on the context's default device; interleaved surface-named steps prove activate-on-switch. SKIPPED on hosts without emulator acceleration.

tests.description: Open Settings and Clock on the same device, then screenshot each by surface name — the second screenshot forces a foreground switch back to Settings via activateApp.
